# Vault Fonts

These vault-local fonts are already installed for portability across synced devices:

- `CaskaydiaCoveNerdFont-SemiLight.ttf`
- `CaskaydiaCoveNerdFont-Regular.ttf`
- `CaskaydiaCoveNerdFont-SemiBold.ttf`
- `CaskaydiaCoveNerdFontMono-SemiLight.ttf`
- `CaskaydiaCoveNerdFontMono-Regular.ttf`

The snippet `.obsidian/snippets/theme-polish-blue-purple.css` loads these files directly.
If any file is missing, CSS falls back to locally installed Cascadia/Caskaydia fonts.
